pages.primaryProblem: Help renters pick a plant placement workflow.
pages.originalUtility: Embedded window light estimator and placement diagram.
targetQueries: where to put houseplants in apartment
pages.meta_title: WindowPlant Lab — Apartment plant light estimator & placement guide
pages.meta_description: Practical workflow and tools to match apartment window light to houseplant placement. Use the estimator and diagrams to find the best spot for your plants.

pages.primaryProblem: Estimate indoor plant light without a dedicated light meter.
pages.originalUtility: Interactive estimator using window direction, distance, and obstruction.
pages.meta_title: Plant Light Estimator — Window direction & distance guide
pages.meta_description: Estimate how much light a spot in your apartment receives using window direction, distance, and obstructions — no light meter required.

pages.primaryProblem: Choose a starting distance from a window for a plant.
pages.originalUtility: Interactive distance calculator with obstruction caveats.
targetQueries: how far from window for plants
pages.meta_title: Plant Distance Calculator — Where to place plants near a window
pages.meta_description: Simple calculator and rules-of-thumb for starting distances from different window types and obstructions to keep plants healthy in apartments.

pages.primaryProblem: Choose plants for a north-facing apartment window.
pages.originalUtility: Selection table with placement zones and failure signs.
pages.meta_title: North-facing window plants — Best choices for low-light apartments
pages.meta_description: Plants that tolerate north-facing windows plus placement zones, care tips, and signs it's too dark for a given species.

pages.primaryProblem: Decide if a dim apartment spot can support a living plant.
pages.originalUtility: Pass/fail placement checklist and decision tree.
targetQueries: can plants survive in low light apartment
pages.meta_title: Low-light plant placement checklist — Will a spot support a plant?
pages.meta_description: A short pass/fail checklist and decision tree to decide if a dim corner in your apartment can realistically support a potted plant.
